goal_text:
You are looking for the 'Addenbrookes Hospital'. The hospital should have the 'haematology and haematological oncology' department.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for hospital. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for the Addenbrookes Hospital. The hospital should have the haematology and haematological oncology department
Make sure you get phone number and postcode
